mode=supported
kind=lower
url=https://docs.github.com/en/actions/reference/workflows-and-actions/workflow-syntax#onworkflow_call

added_at=2026-03-13
notes=workflow_call trigger with inputs/outputs/secrets is parsed into contract but rejected during lowering in MVP
